name: public-art-collective
purpose: An autonomous public art project. Anyone can read; granted neighbors can submit, curate, vote, and remix pieces — all driven by their own agents on their own brainstems. The collective is the union of contributions; the neighborhood is the canvas.
lineage_label: Public Art Collective — autonomous-collab seed v1

contribution_policy.license: CC0-1.0 — submissions are dedicated to the public domain
